items.title: Wolves lose Edwards, DiVincenzo in Game 4 win
items.dek: Wolves star Anthony Edwards will undergo an MRI after leaving Saturday's Game 4 win with an apparent hyperextension of his left knee, and sources told ESPN that
items.body: Wolves star Anthony Edwards will undergo an MRI after leaving Saturday's Game 4 win with an apparent hyperextension of his left knee, and sources told ESPN that Donte DiVincenzo suffered a torn right Achilles tendon.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Sawe first to finish marathon in under 2 hours
items.dek: Sabastian Sawe became the first person to run a marathon in under 2 hours, smashing the world record by winning the London Marathon in 1 hour, 59 minutes and 30
items.body: Sabastian Sawe became the first person to run a marathon in under 2 hours, smashing the world record by winning the London Marathon in 1 hour, 59 minutes and 30 seconds on Sunday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: McDaniels' late layup irks Jokic in Nuggets loss
items.dek: Jaden McDaniels' late layup in Minnesota's 112-96 Game 4 home victory over Denver incited a skirmish with Nikola Jokic and the Nuggets on Saturday night, a scru
items.body: Jaden McDaniels' late layup in Minnesota's 112-96 Game 4 home victory over Denver incited a skirmish with Nikola Jokic and the Nuggets on Saturday night, a scrum that led to ejections on a night when the Timberwolves secured a 3-1 series lead.
items.author: IriLine Desk
